# Review Packet

<!-- READ-ONLY TEMPLATE. Do NOT edit this file during a task. -->
<!-- The reviewer READS this schema, RECEIVES the executor's Handoff as input, and EMITS a filled copy in its response. -->
<!-- If no Handoff section was filled, reject the submission. -->

Task ID: <!-- must match planning and execution packets -->
Plan summary: <!-- from the planning packet -->
Risk level: <!-- from the planning packet: low | elevated -->
Files changed: <!-- from executor Handoff -->
Deviations from plan: <!-- from executor Handoff -->

## Hard gates (verdict = request-changes if any fail; do not run content review)
- [ ] Handoff section present and non-empty
- [ ] `Validation evidence` block exists for EVERY command listed in `Validation.Commands`
- [ ] Every evidence block shows `exit: 0` (or an explicit, accepted "could not run" reason)
- [ ] `Tests added` block exists. If the planning packet's `Tests to add` was non-empty, every planned test is marked `added` or carries a concrete skip reason. Vague skips (e.g. "did not test", "skipped for time") fail this gate.
- [ ] Plan/execute test agreement: `Tests to add:` (plan packet) and `## Tests / To add:` (execute packet) match. A `none` on one side with concrete tests on the other fails this gate — the plan was inconsistent.

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Scope respected — no unrelated changes
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Each acceptance criterion has a corresponding test (or a documented exception)
- [ ] No broken contracts or schemas
- [ ] Edge cases addressed
- [ ] Validation evidence matches the acceptance criteria (not just exit 0 on unrelated commands)
- [ ] No regressions in adjacent code
- [ ] No security issues introduced
- [ ] If `Risk level: elevated`, every matched boundary list (risky / security / migration) got specific scrutiny

Potential regressions:
Missing tests: <!-- list any acceptance criterion lacking test coverage that was not justified -->
Simpler alternative: <!-- is there a simpler way this could have been done? -->
Memory updates to apply: <!-- confirm or amend the executor's memory updates. Use format `- YYYY-MM-DD [topic] fact`. Flag any entry that contradicts an existing one in .ai/memory.md. -->

Verdict: <!-- approve | request-changes | escalate -->
Recommendation: <!-- one sentence next action -->
